title: Political Legacy
shortSummary: Think beyond the next election — build a lasting impact through institutional reform, mentoring the next generation, and creating policy frameworks that endure beyond your time in office.
whyItMatters: The measure of a political career is not how many elections you won but what changed because of your service. Political legacy is about building something that lasts — institutions, policies, and movements that continue to benefit the public long after you leave office.
coreConcepts: Writing and documenting your political journey
The ethics of legacy and how history judges leaders
